title: Bundle Recipe UpPort
description: Bring back the old bundle recipe! The bundle crafting recipe was removed in snapshot 21w18a (Minecraft ~1.18).
body:
**📦 Bring Back the Bundle**

In snapshot 21w18a, Mojang removed the crafting recipe for the Bundle, leaving it unfinished and unobtainable in survival. This mod restores the original recipe and functionality, letting you craft and use Bundles once again in modern versions of Minecraft.

✅ Craft Bundles with the classic recipe (Rabbit Hide + String)

✅ Store multiple item stacks in a single slot

✅ Great for explorers and hoarders alike

Bring back the lost convenience of inventory management — just as Mojang first intended!

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/311245d1d6f687486a77532c8b9e5a9fd396dab2.png)




![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
